settings.heading: Planet Attars
settings.subheading: Nine celestial attars, each resonating with the energy of a Vedic planet. Find the fragrance aligned with your cosmic blueprint.
settings.supporting_text: Navagraha attars from Surya through Ketu — crafted to harmonize your aura with the cosmos.
